pcr: EPD Hub Core PCR v1.2 (2025-03-24); cPCR EN 16757
lca_tool: One Click LCA Concrete EPD Generator v3.2.1
scope: Cradle to gate with options, A4-A5, and modules C1-C4, D
notes: GWP-GHG table (p12) is numerically identical to GWP-total (p9) across every module — including A1-A3 = 232 — despite a non-zero GWP-biogenic component in A1-A3 (-0.0196); likely a reporting artifact (same pattern seen in IES-0029695), not used for the canonical A1A3 value here.
Exposure class is listed as 'A2' (AS 1379/AS 1012 durability exposure classification, p2) — coincides with the EN 15804 module code A2 (transport to manufacturer); the two are unrelated designations.

gwp_a1a3_alt (+A1/CML = 232) retained only to drive a 'not comparable' warning against +A2 figures; it numerically coincides with the +A2 A1A3 total (232) though the underlying A1/A2/A3 splits differ slightly (212/15.8/3.29 vs 213/15.9/3.31).

State (QLD) inferred from the company description (p3: 'staff across Queensland') — the manufacturer/production address itself (p2) reads only '21 Mackay Slade Point Road, Mackay, Australia', with no state abbreviation.
